\tzpentry{ID5972}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5972 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \\\\Delta\\\\phi\\\\!\\\\left(\\\\frac{16}{15}\\\\right) &= \\\\frac{\\\\pi}{15} \\\\approx 12^\\\\circ, \\\\\\\\ \\\\Delta\\\\phi\\\\!\\\\left(\\\\frac{10}{9}\\\\right) &= \\\\frac{\\\\pi}{9} \\\\approx 20^\\\\circ, \\\\\\\\ \\\\Delta\\\\phi(\\\\chi) &= \\\\frac{5\\\\pi}{27} \\\\approx 33.34^\\\\circ. \\\\end{align}
